records.question: What third party companies are Suppliers from Kiribati with maintenance contracts starting on or before 2017-06-14 01:46:59 and ending on or before 2018-03-09 10:40:10?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN maintenance_contracts ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_company_id
WHERE third_party_companies.other_company_details = 'Kiribati' AND maintenance_contracts.contract_start_date <= '2017-06-14 01:46:59' AND maintenance_contracts.contract_end_date <= '2018-03-09 10:40:10' AND third_party_companies.company_type = 'Supplier'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Third_Party_Companies.company_id
FROM Third_Party_Companies
JOIN Assets ON Third_Party_Companies.company_id = Assets.supplier_company_id
JOIN Maintenance_Contracts ON Assets.maintenance_contract_id = Maintenance_Contracts.maintenance_contract_id
WHERE Third_Party_Companies.company_type = 'Supplier'
  AND Third_Party_Companies.company_address LIKE '%Kiribati%'
  AND Maintenance_Contracts.contract_start_date <= '2017-06-14 01:46:59'
  AND Maintenance_Contracts.contract_end_date <= '2018-03-09 10:40:10'

FROM Third_Party_Companies
JOIN Assets ON Assets.supplier_company_id = Third_Party_Companies.company_id
WHERE Third_Party_Companies.company_name = 'McDermott Group'
  AND Third_Party_Companies.company_address = '873 Conrad Creek Apt. 286'
  AND Third_Party_Companies.other_company_details = 'China'
  AND Assets.asset_make = 'FR'
  AND Assets.asset_model = '20 tl'
  AND Assets.asset_acquired_date = '2017-09-19 16:15:45'
  AND Assets.asset_disposed_date >= '2018-03-06 20:36:14'

JOIN maintenance_contracts ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_company_id

WHERE assets.asset_details = 'machine1' AND assets.asset_make = 'RU' AND maintenance_contracts.contract_end_date >= '2018-02-27 05:03:22'

records.question: Which suppliers based in Kiribati have both maintenance contracts and supply assets?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN maintenance_contracts ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_company_id
JOIN assets ON third_party_companies.company_id = assets.supplier_company_id
WHERE third_party_companies.company_type = 'Supplier' AND third_party_companies.other_company_details = 'Kiribati'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT company_id
FROM Third_Party_Companies
WHERE company_address LIKE '%Kiribati%'
  AND company_id IN (SELECT maintenance_contract_company_id FROM Maintenance_Contracts)
  AND company_id IN (SELECT supplier_company_id FROM Assets)
